title: Grenfell Community: Communications Feedback Form
body: "The government is committed to supporting the Grenfell community, both now and in the future.   We want to hear directly from bereaved, survivors and members of the community about how they would prefer to receive updates on our work responding to the tragedy. Please share your views by completing our quick feedback form.  The form is translated into 12 languages which can be accessed via the PDFs on this page. If you have any problems accessing the relevant language, please email grenfelltowersite@communities.gov.uk and the team will be happy to assist.  The feedback form will be open throughout the summer, and we’ll be reviewing your responses regularly. Your views will help us to plan our communications for autumn and beyond. "
